creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text: It seems there is still an interest in keeping this project alive. From what I've seen, the https://github.com/nullobsi/cantata fork (last commit 3 days ago) would probably be the best candidate to use, with fixes for Taglib 2.x and even ported to Qt6. Taglib 1.x support was dropped, however, so a dance will have to be done to either prepare an update to land at the same time as taglib 2.x (my personal preference) or disable the TAGLIB option for the time being.
